level_signals: 5+ years of experience in risk program management, strategy, management consulting, business operations, and/or operations program management
Lead complex global programs and high-impact strategic initiatives
Cross-functional scope spanning Risk Product, Risk Eng, Policy, Data Science

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 5+ years of experience in risk program management, strategy, management consulting, business operations, and/or operations program management
The ability to dig deep into the data and think from first principles while delivering the best results
Ability to manage multiple stakeholders with varying priorities and drive creative solutions and commitment to a shared goal
Strong program management skills with experience managing end-to-end execution of projects/programs that have transformed their company's operations
Enjoys solving complex and hard problems and can turn incomplete, conflicting, or ambiguous inputs into solid action plans and deliver quantifiable business impact
Ability to identify repeated user and specialist-facing issues and build scalable solutions and processes to address them

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Experience with SQL or willingness to learn
Prior experience partnering with Product, Eng, and Operations teams preferred

scope.surface: Risk Operations Enablement — core business and strategic programs spanning operational excellence, Risk User Experience, and cross-functional risk initiatives
primary_metrics_inferred: Operational efficiency gains in Risk Operations
core_responsibilities: Lead complex global programs, from initial scoping to design and execution
Collaborate with multiple stakeholders across Risk Operations, Risk Product, Risk Eng, and other stakeholder teams to prioritize and maximize the impact of projects
Design and launch programs that lead to step-change improvements in operational processes and business outcomes
Serve as the Risk Operations expert and partner with cross-functional stakeholders to scope and execute large projects
Embody Operating Principles and foster Stripe's values and culture

green_flags: Clear team mission and dual objectives stated (preventing bad actors + delivering legitimate user experience)
Explicitly states preferred qualifications are a bonus, not a requirement — lower bar anxiety for applicants
High-impact scope with cross-functional reach into Product, Eng, Policy, and Data Science
SQL listed as 'willingness to learn' acceptable — not a hard gate
red_flags: No location information provided — office, city, remote eligibility, and work authorization are all unstated
Role scope described broadly and somewhat vaguely ('ambiguous, high priority problem spaces') — ownership boundaries unclear
5+ years minimum requirement combined across a wide range of domains makes calibration difficult

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from years requirement and program scope; not explicitly stated)
